nodes.x: Now these were the sons of David, which were born unto him in Hebron; the firstborn Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess; the second Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitess:
¶ And unto David were sons born in Hebron: and his firstborn was Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess;
And David’s two wives were taken captives, Ahinoam the Jezreelitess, and Abigail the wife of Nabal the Carmelite.
So David went up thither, and his two wives also, Ahinoam the Jezreelitess, and Abigail Nabal’s wife the Carmelite.
¶ And David took him more concubines and wives out of Jerusalem, after he was come from Hebron: and there were yet sons and daughters born to David.
Whose sisters were Zeruiah, and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah; Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.
The third, Absalom the son of Maachah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur: the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith:
And the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith; and the fifth, Shephatiah the son of Abital;
And his second, Chileab, of Abigail the wife of Nabal the Carmelite; and the third, Absalom the son of Maacah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur;
And Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashur, the son of Malchijah, and Maasiai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;
¶ But Absalom fled, and went to Talmai, the son of Ammihud, king of Geshur. And David mourned for his son every day.
Three years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Maachah, the daughter of Abishalom.
The fifth, Shephatiah of Abital: the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife.
And the sixth, Ithream, by Eglah David’s wife. These were born to David in Hebron.
Elam the fifth, Jehohanan the sixth, Elioenai the seventh.
Ammiel the sixth, Issachar the seventh, Peulthai the eighth: for God blessed him.

5. Now when he once came with his parents to Timhath, a city of the
Philistines, when there was a great festival, he fell in love with a
maid of that country, and he desired of his parents that they would
procure him the damsel for his wife: but they refused so to do, because
she was not of the stock of Israel; yet because this marriage was of
God, who intended to convert it to the benefit of the…
These six were born unto him in Hebron; and there he reigned seven years and six months: and in Jerusalem he reigned thirty and three years.
In Hebron he reigned over Judah seven years and six months: and in Jerusalem he reigned thirty and three years over all Israel and Judah.
And the time that he reigned over Israel was forty years; seven years reigned he in Hebron, and thirty and three years reigned he in Jerusalem.
And the days that David reigned over Israel were forty years: seven years reigned he in Hebron, and thirty and three years reigned he in Jerusalem.
Thirty and two years old was he when he began to reign; and he reigned eight years in Jerusalem.
And the time that David was king in Hebron over the house of Judah was seven years and six months.
And these were born unto him in Jerusalem; Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon, four, of Bath-shua the daughter of Ammiel:
And these be the names of those that were born unto him in Jerusalem; Shammua, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon,
Now these are the names of his children which he had in Jerusalem; Shammua, and Shobab, Nathan, and Solomon,
And the sons of Shimei were, Jahath, Zina, and Jeush, and Beriah. These four were the sons of Shimei.
And Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brethren had not many children, neither did all their family multiply, like to the children of Judah.
And Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, the sons of Shimhi;
Ibhar also, and Elishama, and Eliphelet,
And Ibhar, and Elishua, and Elpalet,
And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.
Ibhar also, and Elishua, and Nepheg, and Japhia,
And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphalet.
And Elienai, and Zilthai, and Eliel,
And Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia,
And Jiphtah, and Ashnah, and Nezib,
And Mizpeh, and Chephirah, and Mozah,
And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth.
And Adamah, and Ramah, and Hazor,
And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.
And Elishama, and Beeliada, and Eliphalet.
Ibhar also, and Elishama, and Eliphelet,
And Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshohaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah,
These were all the sons of David, beside the sons of the concubines, and Tamar their sister.
And it came to pass after this, that Absalom the son of David had a fair sister, whose name was Tamar; and Amnon the son of David loved her.
¶ And David took more wives at Jerusalem: and David begat more sons and daughters.

David's wives and concubines were given unto him, of me, by the hand of Nathan, my servant, and others of the Prophets who had the keys of this power; and in none of these thiugs did he sin against mo, save in the case of Uriah and his wife; and, therefore, he hath fallen ' from his exaltation, and received his portion ; and he shall not inherit them out of the world ; for I gave them unto…
¶ And Solomon’s son was Rehoboam, Abia his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son,
¶ And the sons of Jeconiah; Assir, Salathiel his son,
Non his son, Jehoshua his son.
¶ And Rehoboam took him Mahalath the daughter of Jerimoth the son of David to wife, and Abihail the daughter of Eliab the son of Jesse;

¶ And Rehoboam the son of Solomon reigned in Judah. Rehoboam was forty and one years old when he began to reign, and he reigned seventeen years in Jerusalem, the city which the Lord did choose out of all the tribes of Israel, to put his name there. And his mother’s name was Naamah an Ammonitess.
And Solomon slept with his fathers, and was buried in the city of David his father: and Rehoboam his son reigned in his stead.
Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,
Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeaterai his son.
Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,
And Joram slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David: and Ahaziah his son reigned in his stead.

But Jehosheba, the daughter of king Joram, sister of Ahaziah, took Joash the son of Ahaziah, and stole him from among the king’s sons which were slain; and they hid him, even him and his nurse, in the bedchamber from Athaliah, so that he was not slain.
Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, Asaiah his son.
Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,
Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,
So Azariah slept with his fathers; and they buried him with his fathers in the city of David: and Jotham his son reigned in his stead.
¶ And Amaziah the son of Joash king of Judah lived after the death of Joash son of Jehoahaz king of Israel fifteen years.
And his brethren, chief of the fathers, two hundred forty and two: and Amashai the son of Azareel, the son of Ahasai, the son of Meshillemoth, the son of Immer,
Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,
And Hezekiah slept with his fathers: and Manasseh his son reigned in his stead.
Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,
And Ahaz slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David: and Hezekiah his son reigned in his stead.
Amon his son, Josiah his son.
¶ But the people of the land slew all them that had conspired against king Amon; and the people of the land made Josiah his son king in his stead.
And the sons of Josiah were, the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.
And the people of the land slew all them that had conspired against king Amon; and the people of the land made Josiah his son king in his stead.
To whom the word of the Lord came in the days of Josiah the son of Amon king of Judah, in the thirteenth year of his reign.
And he was buried in his sepulchre in the garden of Uzza: and Josiah his son reigned in his stead.
And the sons of Josiah were, the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.
And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.
Amon his son, Josiah his son.
And king Zedekiah the son of Josiah reigned instead of Coniah the son of Jehoiakim, whom Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon made king in the land of Judah.
And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.
And of the sons of Heman; Jehiel, and Shimei: and of the sons of Jeduthun; Shemaiah, and Uzziel.
And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.
And Joelah, and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of Gedor.
And of the sons of Elam; Jeshaiah the son of Athaliah, and with him seventy males.
And the sons of Hananiah; Pelatiah, and Jesaiah: the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shechaniah.
¶ And the sons of Jeconiah; Assir, Salathiel his son,
And of the sons of Benjamin; Sallu the son of Meshullam, the son of Hodaviah, the son of Hasenuah,
Malchiram also, and Pedaiah, and Shenazar, Jecamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.
Also of the Levites; Jozabad, and Shimei, and Kelaiah, (the same is Kelita,) Pethahiah, Judah, and Eliezer.
And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hezeki, and Heber,
And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah,
And the sons of Pedaiah were, Zerubbabel, and Shimei: and the sons of Zerubbabel; Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister:
And the sons of Judah after their families were; of Shelah, the family of the Shelanites: of Pharez, the family of the Pharzites: of Zerah, the family of the Zarhites.

And at Jerusalem dwelt certain of the children of Judah, and of the children of Benjamin. Of the children of Judah; Athaiah the son of Uzziah, the son of Zechariah, the son of Amariah, the son of Shephatiah, the son of Mahalaleel, of the children of Perez;
And Hashubah, and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, Jushab-hesed, five.
And Zechariah, and Aziel, and Shemiramoth, and Jehiel, and Unni, and Eliab, and Maaseiah, and Benaiah, with psalteries on Alamoth;
Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilshah, and Ithran, and Beera.
And the sons of Jehaleleel; Ziph, and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asareel.
And Hazar-gaddah, and Heshmon, and Beth-palet,
And the sons of Hananiah; Pelatiah, and Jesaiah: the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shechaniah.
And the sons of Pedaiah were, Zerubbabel, and Shimei: and the sons of Zerubbabel; Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister:
And the sons of Samuel; the firstborn Vashni, and Abiah.
And the sons of Shechaniah; Shemaiah: and the sons of Shemaiah; Hattush, and Igeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.
And of the sons of Harim; Maaseiah, and Elijah, and Shemaiah, and Jehiel, and Uzziah.
And the sons of Neariah; Elioenai, and Hezekiah, and Azrikam, three.
And the sons of Kohath; Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
And the sons of Kohath by their families; Amram, and Izehar, Hebron, and Uzziel.
And the sons of Neariah; Elioenai, and Hezekiah, and Azrikam, three.
And the sons of Uzzi; Izrahiah: and the sons of Izrahiah; Michael, and Obadiah, and Joel, Ishiah, five: all of them chief men.
And the sons of Shechaniah; Shemaiah: and the sons of Shemaiah; Hattush, and Igeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.
And the sons of Uzziel; Mishael, and Elzaphan, and Zithri.
And the sons of Elioenai were, Hodaiah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Dalaiah, and Anani, seven.
And of the sons of Pashur; Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethaneel, Jozabad, and Elasah.
And of the sons of Zattu; Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, and Jeremoth, and Zabad, and Aziza.
And of the sons of Elam; Mattaniah, Zechariah, and Jehiel, and Abdi, and Jeremoth, and Eliah.
